div1.entryFree:
Affined, 1) related, joined by affinity: then the bold and coward seem all a. and kin, Troil. I, 3, 25.
2) bound by any tie: be judge yourself whether I in any just term am a. to love the Moor, Oth. I, 1, 39. if partially a., or leagued in office, thou dost deliver more or less than truth, II, 3, 218.
